name: Real-Time with Supabase
description: Add real-time features using Supabase Realtime: database change subscriptions (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events), presence (who's online), and broadcast (send arbitrary messages to all connected clients). Zero WebSocket server setup.

steps.description: Install Supabase client (realtime is built in)
Create useRealtimeTable(table) hook that subscribes to INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE and returns live rows
Create usePresence(channelId) hook tracking online users with enter/leave events
Create useBroadcast(channel) hook for sending/receiving arbitrary real-time messages
Create live cursor overlay showing other users' mouse positions
Create presence indicator showing online count and avatars
